Petition For Removal Of Trustee And Appointment Of Petitioner As Successor Trustee, For Accounting, And Request For Determination Of Fees And Costs To
Off Calendar Jul-06-2015 Continued To Jul-27-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Amanda Ebey for Eddie Price who is present in court. Mary Mayo for (respondent/trustee) Liz McClay who is present in court.

The court stated that courtesy copies of the petition were not provided to the examiner. Ms. Ebey stated that she was not aware of that and that she did not receive any notes from the examiner or see the tentative ruling. Ms. Mayo stated that the parties are close to reaching an agreement, that they anticipate opening escrow this week and expect to finalize everything in 3 weeks. Ms. Ebey stated that they attended mediation with Ms. Pantazis and that a settlement agreement has been submitted. The petition for removal of trustee and appointment of petitioner as successor trustee, etc., was continued to 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The parties are instructed to provide courtesy copies of the petition and any additional documents filed.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Park. (Not Reported)
